visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt with ruffled lavender sleeves and a black vest, stands in a brightly lit warehouse store (Costco). She is positioned in front of a yellow shelf filled with children's books and toy boxes. (2) Close-up handheld shot of a pop-up book titled 'SEA ANIMALS SOUNDS'. A hand with red-painted nails opens the book, and a large blue 3D whale pops out from the pages. (3) The book pages are turned to show a colorful coral reef with several pop-up fish like clownfish and blue tangs against a vibrant blue background. (4) A large shark head with an open mouth and sharp white teeth pops out. A hand reaches in to touch the shark's snout while the camera zooms in slightly. (5) The scene transitions to a pop-up page featuring several large seabirds with wide wingspans flying over an ocean. The lighting is bright and uniform. (6) The camera returns to the female character who is holding the book and making an exaggerated facial expression with her mouth wide open, looking towards the camera. (7) A close-up of the back of the book shows a white plastic speaker unit and battery compartment with technical text printed on an orange cover. (8) The book is closed and shown in a stack on a retail display table with other educational toys. A person's hand is visible holding the side of the book.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 等一下 我們在好市多. (2) [Variety]: 發 一個神奇的東西. (3) [Variety]: 值得買 小朋友很愛 會說話的故事書 仔細聽. (4) [Variety]: 這是一本 有聲音的書. (5) [Variety]: 這是一個 海底的聲音. (6) [Variety]: 這感覺很適合拿來跟 狗狗玩 耶. (7) [Variety]: 他們會覺得很 有趣吧. (8) [Variety]: 這個好可怕喔. (9) [Variety]: 就既有聲音我覺得這本書好值得. (10) [Variety]: 我覺得他 有一個小問題. (11) [Variety]: 他沒有中文翻譯. (12) [Variety]: 順便練英文啊 反正字不多. (13) [Variety]: 他就是簡單的一些 英文單字 這樣. (14) [Variety]: 這個還剛好可以 練習英文. (15) [Variety]: 但我覺得這個 大鯨魚的聲音 超好聽. (16) [Variety]: 媽呀 我覺得我 叫得出來. (17) [Variety]: 來啊. (18) [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈. (19) [Variety]: 就是這個聲音啊. (20) [Variety]: 有越來越像了. (21) [Variety]: 我把你錄音下去. (22) [Variety]: 你以後看書 我跟你收500塊. (23) [Variety]: 我幫你配音. (24) [Variety]: 比這本書還貴. (25) [Slogan]: 海洋立體 有聲書. (26) [Variety]: 後面還可以關掉 平常就可以省電. (27) [Variety]: 我覺得超可愛的耶. (28) [Variety]: 他上面寫說 售價599. (29) [Variety]: 但他現場 我沒看到價格. (30) [Variety]: 他現場沒有價格. (31) [Variety]: 可以 給小朋友翻翻看. (32) [Variety]: 有七種聲音喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator frequently visible, 1 male individual partially visible and heard behind the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white blouse with lavender ruffled sleeves and a black vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse store featuring high-ceiling aisles, industrial metal shelving units filled with books, toys, and assorted merchandise.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively female voice begins speaking with high energy and positive valence over a light, upbeat acoustic guitar track. (2) A deep, resonant 'whoop' whale call sound effect triggers a new phase, followed by the female expressing excitement. (3) A bubbly, liquid SFX plays while the female voice shifts to a curious tone, followed by soft background laughter from a male speaker. (4) A splashing and snapping sound effect occurs as the vocal energy remains high. (5) A sharp, high-pitched screeching bird SFX cuts in, accompanied by the female narrator's commentary on the book's features. (6) A long, low-frequency animal groan SFX repeats; the female narrator mimics the sound with an exaggerated pitch slide. (7) Loud laughter from both voices erupts, following the comedic mimicry. (8) The male voice provides a calm, narrative-style closing regarding the product's price, while the upbeat guitar music continues to the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Feature Analysis -> Pricing Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and demonstrate a unique interactive animal sound book discovered at Costco, showcasing its auditory features and evaluating its educational value for children.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes sound design and interactive visuals to create an engaging product demonstration for retail-focused audiences.
